description: SESSION CONTEXT LOADER: Fires when an agent session starts. Loads workspace context — DB connection status indicator, available agents, and a welcome banner — so the agent knows its operating environment immediately.

sessionStart.description: Inject project context into session on startup
sessionStart.powershell:
param($input)
$payload = $input | ConvertFrom-Json
$cwd = $payload.cwd
# Check if .env exists
$envExists = Test-Path (Join-Path $cwd '.env')
$envStatus = if ($envExists) { 'CONFIGURED' } else { 'MISSING — copy .env.example to .env' }
# Check if MCP server is built
$distExists = Test-Path (Join-Path $cwd 'mcp-server/dist/index.js')
$mcpStatus = if ($distExists) { 'BUILT' } else { 'NOT BUILT — run: cd mcp-server && npm run build' }
# Check output dir
$outputDir = Join-Path $cwd 'output'
if (-not (Test-Path $outputDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $outputDir | Out-Null }
$outputCount = (Get-ChildItem $outputDir -Filter '*.docx' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count
# Build context output
$context = @"
=== E2E COPILOT AGENTS — SESSION STARTED ===
Project  : $cwd
.env     : $envStatus
MCP Build: $mcpStatus
Output/  : $outputCount existing document(s)
MEMORY   : $(if (Test-Path (Join-Path $cwd 'MEMORY.md')) { 'EXISTS (pipeline in progress)' } else { 'Not found (new session)' })

>>> ENTRY POINT: @e2e-orchestrator <<<
  Start here for ALL new features. It coordinates the full pipeline.
  Type: @e2e-orchestrator I need to build [your feature]

Pipeline Agents (called by orchestrator):
  @requirements-agent  — Step 1: Requirements + Word doc
  @sql-impl-agent      — Step 2: SQL DDL + stored procs
  @code-review-agent   — Step 3: Code review + report
  @unit-test-agent     — Step 4: Deploy + test + report

Skill Shortcuts:
  /sql-tsql-standards  /schema-analysis  /sql-test-patterns
  /docx-document-writer  /handoff

Prompt Shortcuts:
  /new-pipeline           — Start a new E2E feature pipeline
  /run-full-pipeline      — Run all 4 stages manually
  /db-health-check        — Audit database schema
  /generate-unit-tests    — Generate test suite for a stored proc

Active Safety Hooks:
  security-gate       — Blocks DROP TABLE / TRUNCATE without dry-run
  dry-run-enforcer    — Requires dryRun=true before real SQL execution
  audit-logger        — Logs all tool calls to logs/agent-audit.log
============================================
"@
# Write context to a temp file that the agent can read
$contextFile = Join-Path $cwd '.copilot-state/session-context.txt'
$stateDir = Join-Path $cwd '.copilot-state'
if (-not (Test-Path $stateDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $stateDir | Out-Null }
Set-Content -Path $contextFile -Value $context
Write-Output $context
exit 0
sessionStart.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
cwd=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd',''))")
[ -f "$cwd/.env" ] && env_status='CONFIGURED' || env_status='MISSING — copy .env.example to .env'
[ -f "$cwd/mcp-server/dist/index.js" ] && mcp_status='BUILT' || mcp_status='NOT BUILT — run: cd mcp-server && npm run build'
[ -f "$cwd/MEMORY.md" ] && mem_status='EXISTS (pipeline in progress)' || mem_status='Not found (new session)'
mkdir -p "$cwd/output" "$cwd/.copilot-state"
output_count=$(ls "$cwd/output/"*.docx 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
cat <<EOF
=== E2E COPILOT AGENTS — SESSION STARTED ===
Project  : $cwd
.env     : $env_status
MCP Build: $mcp_status
Output/  : $output_count existing document(s)
MEMORY   : $mem_status

>>> ENTRY POINT: @e2e-orchestrator <<<
  Start here for ALL new features. It coordinates the full pipeline.
  Type: @e2e-orchestrator I need to build [your feature]

Pipeline Agents (called by orchestrator):
  @requirements-agent  — Step 1: Requirements + Word doc
  @sql-impl-agent      — Step 2: SQL DDL + stored procs
  @code-review-agent   — Step 3: Code review + report
  @unit-test-agent     — Step 4: Deploy + test + report

Skill Shortcuts:
  /sql-tsql-standards  /schema-analysis  /sql-test-patterns
  /docx-document-writer  /handoff

Prompt Shortcuts:
  /new-pipeline           — Start a new E2E feature pipeline
  /run-full-pipeline      — Run all 4 stages manually
  /db-health-check        — Audit database schema
  /generate-unit-tests    — Generate test suite for a stored proc

Active Safety Hooks:
  security-gate       — Blocks DROP TABLE / TRUNCATE without dry-run
  dry-run-enforcer    — Requires dryRun=true before real SQL execution
  audit-logger        — Logs all tool calls to logs/agent-audit.log
============================================
EOF
exit 0
